detail: ₹10,900 crore budget; E2W subsidies extended to July 31, 2026; ₹2,500/kWh capped at ₹5,000/vehicle
EV charging cut to 5.49p/kWh from Apr 1; below 1.5p/mile; annual savings £1,040 vs ICE
Sub-Decree 52 issued Mar 26; BEV import duty 35%→0%, PHEV 35%→7%; effective April 1

policy: EV fee cuts + petrol car surcharges
detail: EV registration fees -30%, petrol car charges +30%; 10% fleet mandate by end-2026
Up to €3K EV purchase tax deduction; VAT cut 21%→10% on EV-related items

policy: DTI pivots from RACE to EVIS (EO pending)
detail: DTI drops combustion-friendly RACE programme in favour of EVIS after Marcos Mar 24 Energy Emergency (EO 110); ~₱9B/manufacturer framework, 40% tooling/equipment support, tax breaks, charging mandates. DOJ opinion Mar 29; FIRB review ongoing; executive order not yet issued.

policy: Climate & Social Plan EV scrap-bonus (up to €30K) — public consultation
detail: Draft programme under the Climate & Social Plan (ΚΚΣ) offering up to €30K for zero/low-emission vehicle purchase in exchange for scrapping old polluting cars; targets transport-vulnerable households and small businesses. Public consultation opened Jan 2026 (pre-crisis origin); pilot rollout planned H1 2026 in islands/mountain regions; nationwide if successful. NOT YET LEGISLATED — under consideration.
